title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE DADIANGAS NORTH "A" ELEMENTARY SCHOOL TO JOSE P. LAUREL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 4116

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6706, February 10, 1989 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE DADIANGAS NORTH "A" ELEMENTARY SCHOOL TO JOSE P. LAUREL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Dadiangas North "A" Elementary School in Cahilsot District, General Santos City, South Cotabato, shall hereafter be known and referred to as the Jose P. Laurel Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on September 21, 1988 and December 2, 1988, respectively.

(Sgd.) EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.) QUIRINO D. ABAD SANTOS, JR.

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House of

Representatives

Approved: Enacted without executive approval, February 10, 1989

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
